compressed_prompt: Write acoustic song Korean peninsula no commas
response:
The morning mist on the Nakdong River
A slow sun on the Diamond Mountains
A single note hangs in the silent air
A fragile thread spun from a prayer

A farmer bends in a field of green
A Seoul window holds a dream
The very same sky the very same ground
Two different hearts make the very same sound

One peninsula beneath the moon
One old and aching tune
Strummed on a wire across a divide
With nowhere left for the sound to hide

No border deep enough to keep
This melody from the soil so steep
It rises from the rice and the pine
A simple song for a fractured line

One peninsula beneath the moon
One old and aching tune
Strummed on a wire across a divide
With nowhere left for the sound to hide

The echo calls from hill to hill
A promise that the land holds still
For a single chord a unified strain
To find its way home again
